query:
INSERT INTO employees (
  employeeId, 
  legalFirstName, 
  legalLastName, 
  preferredName,
  email, 
  phone, 
  serviceLine, 
  currentPhase, 
  status,
  dob,
  streetAddress,
  city,
  state,
  zipCode,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
) VALUES (
  'TEST-001',
  'Jane',
  'Doe',
  'Jane',
  'jane.doe@test.com',
  '555-123-4567',
  'OLTL',
  'Documentation',
  'In Progress',
  '1990-05-15',
  '123 Test Street',
  'Philadelphia',
  'PA',
  '19101',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
